Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 3, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how OffroadMate ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use the OffroadMate mobile application (the "App"). By using the App, you agree to the practices described here.

Information We Collect

  • Profile information you provide: name, location (city/state), vehicle and rig details, skill level, bio, and profile photo.
  • Location data: with your permission, approximate or precise device location to show nearby riders and trips and to support recovery/SOS features.
  • Content you create: trips, messages, marketplace listings, recovery alerts, and ratings.
  • Usage data: basic analytics about how the App is used to improve reliability and features.

How We Use Your Information

  • To provide core features: discovering riders, hosting and joining trips, messaging, the marketplace, and recovery alerts.
  • To personalize content such as nearby riders and relevant trips.
  • To send notifications you opt into, such as trip reminders and recovery broadcasts.
  • To maintain safety, verify identity, and prevent abuse.

Location Information

Location is used only to power features you request, such as finding nearby riders, setting trip meetup points, and broadcasting recovery alerts. You can disable location access at any time in your device settings; some features may be limited as a result.

Sharing of Information

We do not sell your personal information. Profile details you choose to publish (such as name, rig, and approximate location) are visible to other users as part of the App's social features. We may share information with service providers who help operate the App, or when required by law.

Data Retention

We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the App. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.

Your Choices

  • Edit or remove profile information within the App.
  • Control location and notification permissions in your device settings.
  • Request account and data deletion by contacting us.

Children's Privacy

The App is not intended for individuals under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected by updating the "Last updated" date above.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, contact us at support@offroadmate.app.

© 2026 OffroadMate. All rights reserved.
